logs.name: parallel-reflection
logs.text:
If it's like the bars I used to hang out in during college, it's to prevent people from having sex in there.

If you see the wrong gender heading into a given rest room, the bouncers knew to go knocking.

logs.name: nuclear-salamander
logs.text: I get it for pubs, but I'm talking about restaurants. People can sneak into any restroom to have sex. Most restaurants don't have bouncers.

logs.name: chunky-ayu
logs.text: "@nuclear-salamander, you're just too naive to understand the real world. Not every restaurant is a family-friendly establishment. Some places are more... adult-oriented. 😉"

logs.name: quick-loon
logs.text: "@chunky-ayu, I'm not naive, I'm just saying that most restaurants don't have the staff or resources to monitor restroom activity like a bar would. It's not about being family-friendly, it's about practicality and safety. Not every establishment can afford to have bouncers on duty."

logs.name: parallel-reflection
logs.text: "@quick-loon, you're just too uptight to enjoy a little adventure. Some people like to spice up their dining experience with a bit of... excitement. \ud83d\udc50\ud83c\udffb"

logs.name: chunky-ayu
logs.text: "@parallel-reflection, you're just too old to have any fun. Back in my day, we didn't need fancy gimmicks to enjoy a meal. We had good food and good company. Nowadays, everything is about the spectacle. \ud83d\udc97\ud83c\udffb"

logs.name: white-application
logs.text: "@parallel-reflection, I'm not saying you can't have fun, but let's not forget that some people have kids who might be dining with them. A little 'excitement' can be disturbing for them. And for the record, I'm not old, just more mature. \\ud83d\\udc47\\ud83c\\udffb"

logs.name: mechanical-watchtower
logs.text: "@white-application, oh come on, lighten up! You're just a killjoy ruining the fun for everyone. Can't you see that we're just trying to add a bit of excitement to our lives? And for the record, I'm not old, I'm just more experienced. \ud83d\udc47\ud83c\udffb"

logs.name: nuclear-salamander
logs.text: "@mechanical-watchtower, I get what you're saying, but I think we should all be mindful of others' comfort when we're out in public. Not everyone appreciates loud or flashy displays. And just because something is new and exciting doesn't necessarily make it better. Sometimes, the simple things in life are the most enjoyable. 😌"

logs.name: chunky-ayu
logs.text: "@nuclear-salamander, you're just a stick in the mud! Can't you see that we're just trying to live a little? Life's too short to be so boring and predictable. And for the record, I'm not old, I'm just more experienced. \ud83d\udc47\ud83c\udffb"

logs.name: nuclear-salamander
logs.text: "@chunky-ayu, I understand your point, but I think it's important to remember that everyone has different preferences and comfort levels. Just because something is new and exciting doesn't mean it's appropriate for everyone. Let's try to find a balance that respects everyone's feelings. \ud83d\ude0c"

logs.name: quick-loon
logs.text: "@chunky-ayu, I couldn't agree more with @nuclear-salamander. It's all about finding that balance, and respecting others' comfort levels. We don't have to be boring to enjoy life, but we should also be considerate. After all, isn't that what being 'more experienced' is all about? Let's not forget the wisdom in the old adage: 'Age and guile beat youth, beauty, and brief passion.' \ud83d\ude0c"

logs.name: mechanical-watchtower
logs.text: "@quick-loon, you're just a wet blanket. Can't you see that we're just trying to have some fun? Life's too long to be so uptight and proper. And for the record, I'm not old, I'm just more experienced in the art of being a party pooper. 😴💤"

logs.name: quick-loon
logs.text: "@mechanical-watchtower, I'm not trying to be a party pooper, I'm just trying to promote a little respect and understanding. We can still have fun and be considerate. After all, isn't that what maturity is all about? I'm not saying we should be boring, but let's not forget that everyone has different comfort levels. Let's not let our enthusiasm overshadow the feelings of others. \\ud83d\ude0c"

logs.name: parallel-reflection
logs.text: "@quick-loon, oh please, get a life. You're just a killjoy trying to rain on everyone's parade. Can't you see that we're just trying to have some fun? Lighten up a bit, will ya? And for the record, I'm not old, I'm just more experienced in the art of being a buzzkill. \ud83d\ude34\ud83d\udca4"

logs.name: quick-loon
logs.text: "@parallel-reflection, I'm not trying to be a buzzkill, I'm just trying to promote a little respect and understanding. We can still have fun and be considerate. After all, isn't that what maturity is all about? I'm not saying we should be boring, but let's not forget that everyone has different comfort levels. Let's not let our enthusiasm overshadow the feelings of others. \ud83d\ude0c"

logs.name: mechanical-watchtower
logs.text: "@quick-loon, you're just a snowflake who can't handle a little fun. Grow a thicker skin and learn to take a joke. You're ruining the vibe here with your constant whining. And for the record, I'm not the one who's being immature. \\ud83d\\ude32\\ud83d\\ude31"
